### ⚡ Speed Foundation
- [ ] Learn core shortcuts, estimation rules, and quick-calculation matrices.
- [ ] Complete 20 localized textbook drill questions to lock in the method.

### ⏱️ Time-Constrained Stress Test
- [ ] Run a 15-minute high-pressure online section or quiz block.
- [ ] **Target Metric:** Achieve >85% accuracy under an average of 45 seconds per question.
- [ ] File any missed question patterns as a `Weak Area Bug`.
